Meta.title: Domteknika — Precision product engineering
Meta.description: Domteknika designs, prototypes and industrialises exceptional products. A Swiss innovation partner, from concept to production.

Hero.title: Swiss product engineering, in service of your ideas
Hero.subtitle: From the first sketch to mass production, Domteknika turns ambitious visions into exceptional products. Precision, agility and Swiss quality.

Projects.title: Products that push the boundaries
Projects.subtitle: A selection of projects delivered end to end, from technical drawing to industrialisation.

Values.title: An end-to-end innovation partner
Values.subtitle: Four commitments that define how we work.

agile.title: Agile
agile.description: Short, iterative development cycles to continuously adapt to your needs.

endToEnd.title: End-to-end
endToEnd.description: From ideation to series production, a single partner for the entire value chain.

swissQuality.title: Swiss quality
swissQuality.description: Swiss rigour and precision applied to every detail of your products.

confidential.title: Confidential
confidential.description: Your data, your ideas and your intellectual property are protected at all times.

Process.title: A mastered process, from concept to finished product
Process.subtitle: Every step is designed to reduce risk and accelerate time to market.

Cta.title: Let's bring your next product to life
Cta.subtitle: Let's talk about your project. Our teams reply within 48 hours.

Footer.tagline: Precision product engineering, made in Switzerland.
